2007 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki

Chronology
2006 in KSW 2007 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2008 in KSW

The year 2007 was the fourth year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. In 2007 Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki held 3 events beginning with, KSW VII: Konfrontacja.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW VII: Konfrontacja June 2, 2007 Torwar Hall Warsaw, Poland
2 KSW Elimination 1 September 15, 2007 Hala Orbita Wrocław, Poland
3 KSW VIII: Konfrontacja November 10, 2007 Torwar Hall Warsaw, Poland

KSW VII: Konfrontacja

[edit]
KSW VII: Konfrontacja
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJune 2, 2007
VenueHala Torwar
City Warsaw, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 6 KSW VII: Konfrontacja KSW Elimination 1

KSW VII: Konfrontacja[1] was a mixed martial arts event held on June 2, 2007 at the Hala Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.

KSW Elimination[2] was a mixed martial arts event held on September 15, 2007 at the Hala Orbita in Wrocław, Poland.

KSW VIII: Konfrontacja[3] was a mixed martial arts event held on November 10, 2007 at the Hala Torwar in Warsaw, Poland.
